channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Falling. It Isn’t the Delivery Numbers.
item.description: Tesla stock fell in premarket trading Thursday, ahead of its release of first-quarter delivery figures, as investors grew nervous about renewed conflict in the Middle East. Benchmark international crude oil prices were up 8% in early trading on Thursday, above $109 per barrel. Coming into Thursd...

item.title: Tesla Deliveries Due. Elon Musk's EV Giant Will Reclaim This Crown.
item.description: Tesla deliveries for Q1 are due before the open, with Elon Musk's EV giant set to be BEV leader again. Tesla stock fell but is up for the week.

item.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Tesla, Globalstar, Amazon, Exxon Mobil, Penguin Solutions, and More
item.description: Tesla slides ahead of delivery numbers, while Globalstar rallies after a report says Amazon is in discussions to buy the satellite operator.

item.title: Tesla's China-made EV sales rise 8.7% in March
item.description: BEIJING, April 2 (Reuters) - Sales of Tesla's China-made electric vehicle grew 8.7% from a year earlier to 85,670 vehicles in March, extending gains for a fifth month, as the U.S. automaker navigated

item.title: SpaceX files confidentially for IPO on day Nasa launches first moon mission in half a century
item.description: SpaceX, Elon Musk's reusable rocket and space exploration company, chose the day of Nasa's Artemis II lunar mission, the first crewed flight to the moon in more than 50 years, to file confidentially for what could become the largest initial public offering in history. The company submitted...

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Jump As Trump Vows To Hit Iran 'Hard'; Tesla Deliveries Due
item.description: Futures fell and oil prices jumped as President Trump said the U.S. would continue to hit Iran "extremely hard" over the next 2-3 weeks.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump's Iran Speech Looms; Tesla Set To Reclaim EV Crown
item.description: President Donald Trump will speak to the nation on the Iran war at 9 p.m. ET. Tesla deliveries are due early Thursday.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Rises Higher Than Market: Key Facts
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) closed the most recent trading day at $381.26, moving +2.56% from the previous trading session.

item.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Leads Charge After Trump's War Comments; Amazon, Tesla Rise (Live Coverage)
item.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index rose Wednesday after Trump said Iran's new president is asking for a ceasefire.

item.title: GLJ Maintains Sell Rating on Tesla (TSLA)
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 10 Best Car Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 30, GLJ Research reiterated its Sell rating on Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Newest Version Of Tesla FSD 'Probably' Launching This Week, Elon Musk Says
item.description: Tesla could release the newest version of its Full Self-Driving (FSD) system as soon as this week, Elon Musk said. The stock is up 2%.

item.title: Tesla confirms Model S and Model X production is over — only ~600 left
item.description: Elon Musk confirmed today that Tesla has stopped producing the Model S and Model X. Custom orders are no longer accepted, and only about 600 vehicles remain in inventory worldwide. The CEO shared a throwback photo from the original Model S production launch at the Fremont factory in June 2012, wr...

item.title: Amazon Is Starting to Put Tesla in the Rearview Mirror
item.description: Despite Tesla's many achievements, the company appears to be falling behind in a key future business that's helping prop up its stock price.

item.title: Tesla begins ‘honorable discharge’ of Model S, X with massive move
item.description: Tesla has officially started the “honorable discharge” of the Model S and Model X with a massive move, removing the two vehicles from Custom Orders and only offering inventory options. It is the latest move Tesla has made to pull the Model S and Model X from its lineup , a decision CEO Elon Musk ...

item.title: Tesla’s Path to $1,000 Per Share Runs Through the Autonomous Vehicle Boom
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) has been reframed by Elon Musk around a single idea: autonomous vehicles will generate more economic value than anything else Tesla has ever built. On the Q4 2025 earnings call, Musk described the Cybercab’s design philosophy as optimizing “the fully considered cost per mile o...

item.title: SpaceX files confidentially for IPO that will rewrite the record books
item.description: Elon Musk’s rocket and satellite company submitted its draft registration to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission today for an initial public offering, targeting June at a $1.75 trillion valuation. This would be the largest in history.

item.title: Are Mag 7 Stocks Stabilizing? What the Microsoft and Tesla Charts Show.
item.description: Tesla, an electric vehicle player, trades 26% off its most recent 52-week high and is lower by 17% year to date.

item.title: SpaceX registers to take rocket maker public in blockbuster IPO, Bloomberg News reports
item.description: By Manya Saini April 1 (Reuters) - Elon Musk's SpaceX has confidentially filed for a U.S. initial public offering, setting the stage for what could become the largest stock market listing on record,

item.title: SpaceX confidentially files for IPO
item.description: SpaceX officially kicked off its IPO process, which could result in the biggest public offering ever.

item.title: SpaceX files for IPO, sources say, offering investors stake in Musk's space ambitions
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX has confidentially filed for a U.S. initial public offering, two people familiar with the matter told Reuters on Wednesday, setting the stage for what could become the largest stock market listing on record. SpaceX puts more rockets in space than any other company and promises ...

item.title: Where Will Tesla Stock Be in 5 Years?
item.description: The company's future largely depends on the scaling of its robotaxi business, which is set to start this year.

item.title: Xiaomi hires Tesla’s former head of sales in China to lead its auto retail push
item.description: Xiaomi has recruited Kong Yanshuang, formerly Tesla’s General Manager for the China region, to take charge of its growing automotive sales operations. The hire signals a significant professionalization of Xiaomi’s EV retail strategy as the company targets 550,000 deliveries in 2026. Kong joined X...

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises Ahead of Delivery Numbers. Brace for Volatility.
item.description: Tesla is slated to report first-quarter delivery figures on Thursday. Wall Street is expecting about 366,000 vehicles sold in the first quarter, up from 337,000 a year ago. Wall Street was looking for about 378,000 vehicles.

item.title: Tesla FSD v14.3 launching this week, Musk claims ‘last piece of the puzzle’
item.description: Elon Musk announced today that Tesla “Full Self-Driving” v14.3 is currently in employee beta testing and will “probably go to wide release end of week.” Musk has described v14.3 as the version that will make your car “feel like it is sentient.” If that sounds familiar, it should. Musk has promise...

item.title: Nio, Li Auto, and Xpeng Climb on Record March Deliveries as Tesla Faces a Softer Q1
item.description: Shares of Nio (NYSE:NIO), Li Auto (NASDAQ:LI), and Xpeng (NYSE:XPEV) are all trading higher Wednesday morning after each posted March delivery figures, while Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) ticks up modestly ahead of its own Q1 report. The Chinese EV trio is riding a strong end-of-quarter rebound, with March...

item.title: Tesla EV Deliveries On Tap After China Rivals Report Rebounding Sales In March
item.description: BYD and other China EV makers reported March sales jumped vs. February. Tesla should reclaim a key EV crown when it releases deliveries on Thursday.

item.title: Tesla Sees Strong Rebound in Europe Sales
item.description: New model rollout helps revive growth after a challenging year.

item.title: Tesla Is About To Roll Out Its Next FSD Update
item.description: Timing comes as regulators watch more closely

item.title: How the SpaceX IPO Could Affect These Popular Nasdaq ETFs
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX is gearing up for what's likely to be the largest IPO in history and it has implications for the Invesco QQQ ETF.

item.title: Ford’s CEO Says An Affordable Tesla Model 3, Model Y Rival Is Coming
item.description: Jim Farley went on record saying that the American automaker wants a piece of the Model 3 and Model Y’s pie.

item.title: Nvidia, Apple, Tesla on Iran's Hit List as Tehran Warns of Imminent Attacks
item.description: Iran Threatens to Strike Nvidia, Apple, Microsoft as Retaliation for US Strikes

item.title: Tesla: Finally Catching Up To Reality
Update: Market Chatter: Tesla's March Car Registrations Surge in Key European Markets
item.description: (Updates with information from Spain in the fifth and sixth paragraphs.) Tesla's (TSLA) new car r

item.title: Tesla March car registrations soar in key European markets
item.description: STORY: New registrations of Tesla cars more than tripled in France in March to just shy of a two-year-old record high. And they doubled in the Nordic countries. The data released on Wednesday is the latest sign of the EV giant's sales recovery in Europe.

item.title: Tesla Q1 deliveries likely to dip sequentially as EV demand softens
item.description: April 1 (Reuters) - Tesla's first-quarter deliveries are expected to be lower than in the December quarter as the electric-vehicle maker struggles with uneven demand and intensifying competition in

item.title: Tesla: This Is Not The Right Time To Buy The Dip
Billionaire Ken Griffin Buys 2 AI Stocks Chasing a $1 Trillion Market Opportunity in Robotaxis (Hint: Not Tesla)
item.description: Ken Griffin's hedge fund recently bought stock in Nvidia and Amazon.

item.title: Trending tickers: Nike, Tesla, Nvidia, Oracle and Berkeley
item.description: The latest investor updates on stocks that are trending on Wednesday

item.title: Americans Are Warming Up to Robotaxis -- and That's Big News for Alphabet and Tesla
item.description: We're at the dawn of a new frontier in transportation.

item.title: Elon Musk hints at “official ceremony” with throwback photo to close Tesla Model S, Model X chapter
item.description: Tesla has officially begun winding down production of the Model S and Model X, sending farewell emails to U.S. customers on March 27 and updating the website to reflect the end of the line. Shoppers visiting Tesla.com now find only a limited set of Model S and Model X inventory units available fo...

item.title: The Tesla Model S And Model X Are Officially Dead
item.description: It’s the end of the road for the cars that set the standards for truly modern EVs, with plenty of range, comfort, and performance.

item.title: Custom orders of the Tesla Model S & X have come to an end. All that’s left are some in inventory.
item.description: https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2039202381683110191?s=20 submitted by /u/rcnfive [link] [comments]

item.title: Why Tesla (TSLA) Stock Is Up Today
item.description: Shares of electric vehicle pioneer Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) jumped 4.2% in the afternoon session after CEO Elon Musk announced a 'big' investment in Japan to expand the company's service infrastructure and Supercharger network.

item.title: CyberCabs in the wild. NorCal
item.description: Seen in Santa Clara, California today. Steering wheel and driver was in the car. Anyone know what the additional apparatus is for submitted by /u/AlfaHolic4Life [link] [comments]

item.title: Rivian Stock Is Cheap, but Does That Make It a Buy Now?
item.description: Rivian stock trades at a huge discount to Tesla.

item.title: Tesla Q1 deliveries rise 9% amid Robotaxi focus
item.description: Yahoo Finance senior autos reporter Pras Subramanian joins Asking for a Trend host Josh Lipton to discuss expectations for Tesla's ((TSLA) Q1 global deliveries.

item.title: When Will Elon Musk's Tesla And SpaceX Merge? Here's What Prediction Market Is Saying
item.description: Elon Musk's xAI and SpaceX merged in February, valuing the company at over $1.25 trillion. SpaceX is now preparing for an initial public offering (IPO). SpaceX IPO SpaceX reportedly plans to raise $75 billion from its IPO, valuing the space exploration company at around $1.75 trillion.

item.title: Stock Market Today, March 31: Tesla Rises Ahead of Delivery Report as Rally Eases Demand Concerns
item.description: Tesla rose as the market rallied, with focus turning to its delivery report and whether weaker vehicle demand will test the stock’s recent rebound.

item.title: Elon Musk announces disappointing Tesla Optimus update
item.description: Elon Musk announced a disappointing update to the unveiling of Tesla Optimus and its third-generation iteration, missing a timeline it aimed to hit in the first quarter of the year. Musk has confirmed that the highly anticipated Optimus Gen 3 humanoid robot is already walking around and operation...

item.title: Gary Black Says TSLA Has Underperformed Nasdaq For 5 Years Because It Has Never Lived Up To Unsupervised FSD Hype: 'TSLA Still Has Only 9 Robotaxis'
item.description: Investor Gary Black of The Future Fund LLC has criticized Tesla Inc. for underperforming the Nasdaq 100 index for the last five years, which he thinks happened due to the brand not living up to the Full Self-Driving (FSD) promises. Unsupervised FSD Hype On Sunday, the investor shared his criticis...
